title: Vendor in latest go-selinux and containers/storage
body:
skopeo is failing to build now on 32 bit systems.  go-selinux update
should fix this.  Also container/storage has had some cleanup fixes
to devicemapper support.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @runcom @mtrmac We need this to allow us to build new skopeo packages for Fedora and RHEL. Skopeo is not able to be built on 32 bit systems.

I suspect this will fail because it does not add `github.com/syndtr/gocapability/capability` to `vendor.conf` nor to the `vendor` subdirectory.

BTW https://github.com/containers/image/pull/433 is failing not because of skopeo, but because `c/image/vendor.conf` does not include `github.com/syndtr/gocapability/capability` either.
